target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Vehicle is completely consumed by fire with no discernible structural integrity; all major components are charred and fused together; no repairable parts remain.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: Vehicle is completely charred with no intact structural components; all doors, hood, and frame are destroyed; consistent with catastrophic (K-kill) damage.

summary: Two military equipment targets are confirmed destroyed, both exhibiting catastrophic damage with no discernible structural integrity and complete charring. The scene depicts a road in a mountainous area littered with the wreckage of at least two vehicles, both reduced to burnt-out frames, with soldiers in uniform standing nearby. The functional impact is likely severe, as both assessed targets are completely destroyed and non-operational, indicating a successful strike against critical assets.
